title: Brainfile Contract Schema
description: Schema for task contracts. Contracts formalize what an agent must deliver and how to verify it. Context lives in task.description and task.relatedFiles, not in the contract.

version.description: Contract version number. Increment when amending so agents can detect changes.

deliverables.description: Files or artifacts the agent must produce

constraints.description: Implementation constraints the agent must follow

outOfScope.description: Items explicitly out of scope. Agents must not implement these.

feedback.description: Rework guidance from the PM after failed validation. Contains specific instructions for what needs fixing.

deliverable.description: A single deliverable required by the contract

validation.description: Automated validation. When commands are defined, 'contract validate' runs them automatically.

commands.description: Shell commands to validate deliverables. Run sequentially; any failure marks the contract as failed.

metrics.description: Automatically tracked contract metrics. Managed by CLI/MCP tools.

pickedUpAt.description: When the agent claimed the contract

deliveredAt.description: When the agent marked as delivered

validatedAt.description: When the PM validated the contract

duration.description: Time between pickup and delivery in seconds
